## [00:00 - 01:11]

I saw the funniest thing. I saw the funniest video, right? A coach on a soccer field. He goes to the bunch of little kids. He goes, when you get out there on the field, it's all about winning. All right. Either you win or you lose it. And your dads and your moms who say that it's all about having fun. Yeah, your dad's a loser. I was like, damn it, that's hilarious. I was like, that's so funny. But that's literally how I thought when I was young. I didn't understand that there was such thing as a win-win. I mean, if you'd explain win-win to me as a teenager, I would have been like, no, no, no, this is a scam. You can't both win. How do you both win chess? Right. So many games in life that we're exposed to at a young age, it's all win-lose.
